phase: Phase 7 Display / Graphics Minimal Full Vertical
scope: Add DisplayPanicLastFrameRecord as first-class semantic panic last-frame evidence
Add RecordDisplayPanicLastFrame command and DisplayPanicLastFrameRecorded event
Require exact Store, DisplayObject, FramebufferObject, DisplaySnapshotBarrier, DisplayEventLog, FramebufferWrite, and FramebufferFlushRegion generations
Reject raw framebuffer byte export from panic last-frame summaries
Bound the panic summary record size to the panic-ring record limit
Expose display-panic-last-frame stable ViewV1 and graph historical edges through osctl
no_goals: real framebuffer present or scanout flush
real panic-ring write on bare metal

findings_fixed: Panic last-frame summaries use exact object refs and generations instead of framebuffer labels
Raw framebuffer bytes cannot be exported through the semantic panic summary
Summary record size is bounded to 4096 bytes
ContractGraph treats panic last-frame refs as historical attribution edges
ContractGraph rejects panic last-frame summaries whose write or flush binding drifts from the recorded frame
osctl ViewV1 reports panic record kind, summary digest, and raw-byte export status without dumping adapter state
bad_smells_checked: No real panic-ring write was claimed or simulated as target hardware behavior
No raw framebuffer pointer or byte buffer became semantic truth
No third-party graphics dependency was introduced
osctl emits ViewV1 JSON rather than internal Rust structs
panic last-frame history does not create live ownership
residual_notes: X8 owns panic ring extraction after substrate panic
Future real panic path must write a bounded ContractPanicSummaryV1 to target_abi PanicRingV1 without allocation

residual_gaps: X8 owns panic ring extraction after substrate panic
Future real panic path must write a bounded ContractPanicSummaryV1 to target_abi PanicRingV1 without allocation
